listing_contact_text: Delivery and customs clearance costs are calculated individually for your country. Contact us — we'll answer all your questions.
about_sub: Direct import of used equipment from Korea, end-to-end
about_step1_text: Find the excavator, part, or machinery you need.
about_step2_text: Message us on Telegram, WhatsApp, or Instagram. We'll respond quickly and discuss pricing and shipping to your country.
about_step3_text: Through our registered entity (IP/법인) in Korea, we buy directly from the seller — no middlemen.
about_step4_text: We handle all logistics and customs clearance to Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan, or any other CIS country.
about_why_text: We work directly with verified Korean dealers. Our Korean legal entity ensures a transparent transaction. Customs clearance is tailored to your specific region.
about_contact_text: Contact us — we'll answer all questions and calculate delivery costs.
